message:
security: set 0o600 permissions on migrated auth.json file

Apply the same secure_open_options pattern to the auth migration
path (migrate_auth_to_auth_json). Previously used File::create()
which inherits the umask default (typically 0o644), allowing other
users to read the auth credentials file. Now uses OpenOptions with
explicit 0o600 mode on Unix, matching the session_store_v2 pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
